change_type_matrix.notes: Validate JSON contracts when ADX files change. No app tests required unless docs tooling or code examples changed.
Use targeted component/page tests when narrowing failures. Browser preview is recommended for visible UI changes.
After build, use preview when verifying production HTML, route rewrites, or hashed assets.
Add or update Vitest coverage under src/server/**/__tests__ or related route tests. Smoke via local fetch only when a server is intentionally running.
Use db-generate only for intentional schema changes. Ask before db-migrate, db-push, db-seed, or any command requiring a live DATABASE_URL.
Exercise fail-closed behavior for auth and AI-spend paths. Do not inspect secret values.
Ask before deploy-check or any deploy. Verify Vercel function-count and cron behavior with existing tests where possible.
Desktop build/install commands mutate local generated files or machine state. Ask before install; build only when needed for launcher work.
Use npm only. Review package-lock.json changes carefully.
Do not edit dist/, desktop/, assets/icons/, or generated Drizzle files unless they are intentional outputs from the relevant command.
